query:
-- First: find supplier accounts that map to exactly one customer among matched services
-- Then update unmatched services with those accounts
UPDATE services AS u
JOIN (
  SELECT supplierAccount, supplierName, MIN(customerExternalId) AS customerExternalId
  FROM services
  WHERE customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != ''
    AND supplierAccount IS NOT NULL AND supplierAccount != ''
  GROUP BY supplierAccount, supplierName
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customerExternalId) = 1
) AS mapping ON mapping.supplierAccount = u.supplierAccount
  AND mapping.supplierName = u.supplierName
SET u.customerExternalId = mapping.customerExternalId
WHERE (u.customerExternalId IS NULL OR u.customerExternalId = '')
  AND u.supplierAccount IS NOT NULL AND u.supplierAccount != '';

SELECT ROW_COUNT() AS rows_updated;

-- Then update unmatched services with those accounts
UPDATE services AS u
JOIN (
  SELECT supplierAccount, supplierName, MIN(customerExternalId) AS customerExternalId
  FROM services
  WHERE customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != ''
    AND supplierAccount IS NOT NULL AND supplierAccount != ''
  GROUP BY supplierAccount, supplierName
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customerExternalId) = 1
) AS mapping ON mapping.supplierAccount = u.supplierAccount
  AND mapping.supplierName = u.supplierName
SET u.customerExternalId = mapping.customerExternalId
WHERE (u.customerExternalId IS NULL OR u.customerExternalId = '')
  AND u.supplierAccount IS NOT NULL AND u.supplierAccount != '';

SELECT ROW_COUNT() AS rows_updated;
